zh.Cowlam, York, England,: 英國英格蘭越可爾考拉姆
zh.Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭越可爾考拉姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hutchinson Esq.於大約1427年出生在英國越可爾考拉姆時，他的父親James Hutchinson27歲，母親Ursula Gregory23歲。他於大約1453年與Anne Bennett在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1474年在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安享年49歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Cowlam, York, England,: 英国英格兰越可爾考拉姆
zh-hans.Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰越可爾考拉姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hutchinson Esq.于大约1427年出生在英国越可爾考拉姆时，他的父亲James Hutchinson27岁，母亲Ursula Gregory23岁。他于大约1453年与Anne Bennett在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1474年在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安享年49岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hutchinson Esq. was born about 1427, in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, his father, James Hutchinson, was 27 and his mother, Ursula Gregory, was 23. He married Anne Bennett about 1453, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1474, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hutchinson Esq. est né environ 1427, à Cowlam, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, James Hutchinson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ursula Gregory, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Bennett environ 1453, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1474, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hutchinson Esq. um 1427 in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hutchinson 27 und seine Mutter Ursula Gregory 23. Er hat um 1453 in Yorkshire, England Anne Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1474 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hutchinson Esq. è nato il circa 1427 nel Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, James Hutchinson, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ursula Gregory, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Bennett circa 1453, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1474, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hutchinson Esq.が約1427年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコウラムで生まれた時，父James Hutchinsonは27歳，母Ursula Gregoryは23歳であった。約1453年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAnne Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1474年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで49歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hutchinson Esq.(이)가 대략 1427년 영국 요르크실르 코우램에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hutchinson(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ursula Gregory(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1453년 영국 요르크실르에서 Anne Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1474년 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hutchinson Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1427, em Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Hutchinson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Gregory, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Bennett aproximadamente 1453, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1474, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hutchinson Esq. родился около 1427 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Hutchinson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ursula Gregory, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Bennett около 1453 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1474 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.about 1427–about 1474: e tusa o le 1427–e tusa o le 1474

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hutchinson Esq. nació aproximadamente 1427, en Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Hutchinson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ursula Gregory, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Bennett aproximadamente 1453, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1474, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
